headline_neutral: Security incident disrupts White House Correspondents’ dinner
topic: Security incident and political violence at public event

people.name: Melania Trump
people.role: First Lady of the United States

people.name: Weijia Jiang

events.what: assailant rushed a Secret Service checkpoint

claims.statement: One officer was protected by a bulletproof vest
People heard four or five shots
This is why we have to have all of the attributes of what we’re planning at the White House

context: The event was the White House Correspondents’ Association annual dinner
Donald Trump attended the dinner as president
The venue had increased security due to past incidents
Political violence incidents have occurred in the United States in recent years
